== Notes for [[Item:Q106524|Q106524]] ==

* Wilaadat (Birth): 10th Year after the Year of the Elephant; (580 AD)
* Wafaat (Death): 31 AH (652 AD)

Source 1: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Abd-al-Rahman_ibn_Awf

Source 2: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Umm_Kulthum_bint_Uqba

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000021139635385

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
